verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We've gathered here on holy ground Angels singing all around Stand now before Him Oh, magnify Him! Hallelujah to the Lamb!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Adoration and praises fill my soul Hallelujahs I will bestow I will sing to the Lord Lifting my hands Hallelujah to the Lamb

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: King of kings and Lord of lords We come to You in one accord Holy, holy, Lamb of glory Hallelujahs to the Lamb
